zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Wyham於1354年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親William de Wyham39歲，母親Beatrice de Rye39歲。她於1367年與Nicholas De Hebden在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1424年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾豪威爾享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯利阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Wyham于1354年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲William de Wyham39岁，母亲Beatrice de Rye39岁。她于1367年与Nicholas De Hebden在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1424年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾豪威爾享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯利阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wyham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from Byham Hall in Great Maplestead (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Wyham was born in 1354, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, William de Wyham, was 39 and her mother, Beatrice de Rye, was 39. She married Nicholas De Hebden in 1367, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1424, in Howell, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Wyham, Lincolnshire, England: Wyham with Caldeby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Wyham est née en 1354, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Wyham, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Rye, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas De Hebden en 1367, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Howell, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Wyham, Lincolnshire, England: Wyham with Caldeby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Wyham 1354 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Wyham 39 und ihre Mutter Beatrice de Rye 39. Sie hat 1367 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas De Hebden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1424 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Howell, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Nicholas De Hebden nel 1367, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1424, nel Howell, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Wyhamが1354年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Wyhamは39歳，母Beatrice de Ryeは39歳であった。1367年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでNicholas De Hebdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1424年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホーウエルで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスレアフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Wyham, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윈이함 위스 캘데비
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Wyham(이)가 1354년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Wyham(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Rye(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Nicholas De Hebden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 하월에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 슬리퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Wyham nasceu em 1354, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Wyham, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Rye, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas De Hebden em 1367, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1424, em Howell, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Wyham, Lincolnshire, England: вихам вит калдеби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Wyham родилась в 1354 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Wyham было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Rye, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas De Hebden в 1367 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1424 г. в местности хоуелл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности слифорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Nicholas De Hebden en 1367, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1424, en Howell, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
